MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th August, 2019 S.0. 3172(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following ‘members to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for the period specified against their names with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, published vide number S.0. 1403(E), dated the 4™ September, 2006, namely:— In the said notification, for serial numbers 3 and 4 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “3, Ms. Diya Kumari, Member of -Member Parliament (Lok Sabha) (She shall hold office till 2™ April, 2022 or till she ceases to be a Member of Lok Sabha, whichever is earlier). 4. Shri Rajiv Pratap Rudy, Member - Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) (He shall hold office till 2™ April, 2022 or till he ceases to be a Member of Lok Sabha, whichever is earlier).”. [F. No. 15-25/2009-NTCA] Dr. ANUP KUMAR NAYAK, Addl. Director General of Forests (Project Tiger) Note : The principal notification constituting the National Tiger Conservation Authority was published in the Gazette of India, Extra-ordinary vide number S.0 1403 (E), dated the 4" September, 2006 and subsequently amended as follows:- 1. S.0. 1889(E), dated the 2™ November, 2006; 2. S.0.981(E). dated the 13" June, 2007; 3. No. 15-25/09 NTCA. - published in the Gazette of India Extra Ordinary, Part III Section 4 dated the 1% September, 2009; 4. No. 15-25/09-NTCA. - published in the Gazette of India Extra Ordinary, Part III Section 4 dated the 17" September, 2010; S.0. 1440(E), dated the 21* June, 2011; S.0. 2276(E), dated the 21" September, 2012; $.0. 2556(E), dated the 12" October, 2012; S.0. 2460(E), dated the 9" September, 2015; .
